info.title: Orbonomy
info.description: Unified AI-powered API platform with 50+ endpoints across accommodation, AI inference, content generation, fact-checking, and real-time data services.
info.x-guidance: POST to any endpoint with your data. The server returns 402 with payment-required info. Pay with USDC on Base chain and retry with the payment signature.

post.summary: Search hotels, villas, and accommodations worldwide
Get full property details, amenities, photos, and reviews
Compare prices across multiple booking sources
Find points of interest around a location
Find best deals and discounts for a destination
Plan a full itinerary with accommodation and activities
All-in-one: search + details + nearby + transport + deals
Generate structured content (JSON, CSV, Markdown, HTML)
Rewrite text in different styles and tones
Text classification: sentiment, intent, toxicity, language
Generate first draft from brief or outline
Distill complex text into key points
Shift tone: formal, casual, academic, creative
Check tone and brand voice consistency
Multi-source fact verification with AI synthesis
Search Wikidata for entities and structured facts
Get Wikipedia article summary for a topic
Search existing fact-checks from major organizations
